children.heading: .—Annual Review and Approval Required
children.label: a .—Annual Review and Approval Required
children.text: The Appalachian Regional Commission annually shall review and approve, in accordance with , state and regional development plans and strategy statements, and any multistate subregional plans which may be developed.section 14302 of this title
implements the Commission-approved state development plan;
is included in the Commission-approved strategy statement;
adequately ensures that the project will be properly administered, operated, and maintained; and
otherwise meets the requirements for assistance under this subtitle.

children.heading: .—Affirmative Vote Requirement Deemed Met
children.label: c .—Affirmative Vote Requirement Deemed Met
children.text: After the appropriate state development plan and strategy statement are approved, certification by a state member, when joined by an affirmative vote of the Federal Cochairman, is deemed to satisfy the requirements for affirmative votes for decisions under .section 14302(a) of this title
